findings.description: parseCredentialsFile is now an orphaned export. The commit removed the only production call site (credentialsWatcher.ts) and the import of parseCredentialsFile, but left the function exported in tierDetection.ts. It is still referenced by breakit-api-reliability.test.ts and tierDetection.test.ts, so those tests now cover dead production code. If the function drifts from the inline extraction logic in readCredentials, the tests will give false confidence.
findings.suggestion: Either delete parseCredentialsFile from tierDetection.ts and remove its test coverage, or keep it and have readCredentials call it (passing rawParsed as an already-parsed object, or refactoring the signature). Deleting it is the cleanest path given the refactor goal.
